title: dianthus integer subsp. integer
intro: Dianthus integer subsp. integer, also known as Cheddar pink, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and antifungal properties, which can help to treat wounds and skin infections. The health benefits of Dianthus integer subsp. integer include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and improve overall skin health. The plant is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to support skin health and treat various skin conditions.
